title: Trash and Cleanup
description: Learn to delete files, use the Trash, and clean up your desktop.

steps.instruction: Open Finder and navigate to the Desktop folder.
steps.hint: Click Finder in the Dock, then click 'Desktop' in the sidebar.

steps.instruction: Right-click on 'SampleImage.png' and select 'Move to Trash'.
steps.hint: Right-click on SampleImage.png and choose 'Move to Trash' from the menu.

steps.instruction: You can also use Cmd+Backspace to trash files. Select Welcome.txt and press Cmd+Backspace.
steps.hint: Click on Welcome.txt to select it, then hold Command (⌘) and press Delete/Backspace.

steps.instruction: The files are now in the Trash but not permanently deleted. Click the Trash icon in the Dock to see them.
steps.hint: Click the Trash can icon (🗑️) at the right end of the Dock.

steps.instruction: To permanently delete, you would use 'Empty Trash'. For now, you've completed the macOS Foundations track! Congratulations!
steps.hint: You did it! Click anywhere to finish the lesson.
